text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hrm… I wish my glasses wouldn't
fog up after practice.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've almost tripped thanks to that fog…
But I don't think I'm ready for contacts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My glasses are a part of me.
If only I could find lenses that didn't fog…

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's it! If we cannot buy them, we need only
make some! I'll speak to Tachyon at once.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
T-Tachyon? I think you might be
onto something, but… I'm not sure
asking her is a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You know… Tachyon's experiments always
make Cafe run and hide in the library…

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But trial and error is necessary for progress.
We cannot expect results without sacrifice.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I will be that sacrifice.
Once a prototype has been prepared,
I shall let you know.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ummm… Well… D-Don't push yourself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Even if Tachyon's research
leaves me with a pair of glasses with legs…
I will continue on!
